Event: The Forest Sorcery Festival

Sage Bot Item Code: T22


Other locations the gear can be found

Mystic Dragon
Grove Totem

Once in a while, covers a random enemy with acid. That enemy takes 150000 magic damage over 2 sec. The acid corrodes their armor, reducing it by 15% per second for a total of 3 sec. When the armor reduction reaches 45%, the effect lasts for another 2 sec.

Requirements: 90
